seo.title: Careers | HeartLink
seo.description: Join HeartLink's discreet global team of relationship managers, elite scouts and psychologists.

hero.title: For those trusted with what cannot be casual.
hero.description: We seek people of judgment, emotional intelligence and impeccable discretion. The work is intimate, exacting and quietly consequential.

rolesIntro.title: A prestigious practice of human understanding.
rolesIntro.description: HeartLink is not a volume recruitment environment. Every colleague becomes a custodian of private lives and family legacies. We value cultural fluency, elegant communication, mature judgment and the restraint to know when not to speak.

roles.title: Senior Relationship Manager
roles.details: Mumbai · Hybrid · 8+ years in private client, luxury or advisory services

roles.title: Elite Network Scout
roles.details: Global · Flexible · Exceptional social intelligence and trusted networks

roles.title: Relationship Psychologist
roles.details: India · Consulting · Advanced qualification and couple/family practice

roles.title: Private Office Associate
roles.details: Mumbai · Full-time · High-touch operations and absolute confidentiality

culture.title: Small by design. Exacting by nature.
culture.description: We work without scripts, quotas or superficial signals of success. The standard is a thoughtful process, a protected client and advice we would stand behind in the lives of our own families.

cards.title: Discretion is a discipline.
cards.description: Privacy is practised in every message, meeting, note and introduction.

cards.title: Judgment over velocity.
cards.description: We reward depth of thought, not the speed of moving a profile through a system.

cards.title: Service without servility.
cards.description: We are warm, exact and candid enough to offer clients the truth with care.

closing.quote: Exceptional people do not always arrive through open roles.
